Title: Navigate to Settings Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click impostazioni" button.
2. Verify that the "Apertura pagina impostazioni" page opens.
Expected Result: The settings page should open successfully.

Title: Navigate to New Place Visualization
Preconditions: User is on the settings page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Visualizzazione nuovo luogo" option.
2. Verify that the new place visualization page does not open.
Expected Result: The new place visualization page should not open.

Title: Open Detailed Place Page
Preconditions: User is on the new place visualization page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click sul luogo" button.
2. Verify that the "Apertura pagina luogo dettagliata" page opens.
Expected Result: The detailed place page should open successfully.

Title: Open Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click Pathfinder" button.
2. Verify that the "Apertura pagina Pathfinder" page opens.
Expected Result: The Pathfinder page should open successfully.

Title: Confirm Action on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Perform a swipe action on the "Swipe verso fatto" button.
2. Verify that the swipe action is not confirmed.
Expected Result: The swipe action should not be confirmed.

Title: Navigate Back to Home Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click 'Indietro'" button.
2. Verify that the user is navigated back to the homepage.
Expected Result: The user should be navigated back to the homepage.

Title: View Question Page After Going Back
Preconditions: User has gone back from the detailed place page.
Test Steps: 1. Verify that the "Visualizzazione domanda" page is displayed.
Expected Result: The question page should be displayed.

Title: Select Answer When Suggestion Available
Preconditions: User is on the question page and a suggestion is available.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Scelta risposta" button.
2. Verify that the "Visualizzazione luogo suggerito" page is displayed.
Expected Result: The suggested location page should be displayed.

Title: Handle No Suggestion Scenario
Preconditions: User is on the question page and no suggestion is available.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Scelta risposta" button.
2. Verify that an error message indicating no suggestion is available is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed.

Title: Open System Map from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Apertura mappa di sistema" option.
2. Verify that the system map is opened.
Expected Result: The system map should be opened successfully.

Title: Open Yelp Site in Browser
Preconditions: User is on the system map.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Apertura sito Yelp sul browser" option.
2. Verify that the Yelp site is opened in the browser.
Expected Result: The Yelp site should be opened in the browser.

Title: Start Call to Business
Preconditions: User is on the Yelp site.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Avvio chiamata al business" option.
2. Verify that the call to the business starts.
Expected Result: The call to the business should start successfully.

Title: Return to Homepage After Call
Preconditions: User has started a call to the business.
Test Steps:
1. End the call.
2. Verify that the user is returned to the homepage.
Expected Result: The user should be returned to the homepage.

Title: Modify Preferences After Returning to Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the homepage after returning from a call.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Modifica preferenze" option.
2. Verify that the preference modification page is displayed.
Expected Result: The preference modification page should be displayed.

Title: Like/Dislike Option on Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Like/Dislike" button.
2. Verify that the like/dislike action is recorded.
Expected Result: The like/dislike action should be recorded successfully.

Title: Navigate to Business Website
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click 'Open in Browser'" button.
2. Verify that the business website is opened in the browser.
Expected Result: The business website should be opened in the browser.

Title: Call Business Directly from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Click 'Call Business'" button.
2. Verify that the call to the business starts.
Expected Result: The call to the business should start successfully.

Title: Negative Test Case - Invalid Input
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to enter invalid input data.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: Edge Case - Maximum Number of Likes/Dislikes
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to like/dislike the place beyond the maximum limit.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating the maximum limit has been reached.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing Required Fields
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to submit form without filling in required fields.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating missing required fields.

Title: Negative Test Case - Incorrect URL Format
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an incorrect URL format in the "Open in Browser" field.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating an incorrect URL format.

Title: Negative Test Case - Invalid Phone Number
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an invalid phone number in the "Call Business" field.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating an invalid phone number.

Title: Negative Test Case - Nonexistent Business
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a nonexistent business name in the "Call Business" field.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating the business does not exist.

Title: Negative Test Case - Network Error
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a network error while attempting to open the Yelp site or make a call.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating a network issue.

Title: Negative Test Case - Timeout Error
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a timeout error while attempting to open the Yelp site or make a call.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating a timeout issue.

Title: Negative Test Case - Unauthorized Access
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to access restricted features without proper authorization.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating unauthorized access.

Title: Negative Test Case - Insufficient Permissions
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to perform actions requiring higher permissions.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating insufficient permissions.

Title: Negative Test Case - Server Unavailable
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a server unavailable scenario while attempting to open the Yelp site or make a call.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating the server is unavailable.

Title: Negative Test Case - Database Connection Failure
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a database connection failure while attempting to open the Yelp site or make a call.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating a database connection failure.

Title: Negative Test Case - Unexpected Error
Preconditions: User is on the detailed place page.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate an unexpected error while attempting to open the Yelp site or make a call.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: An appropriate error message should be displayed indicating an unexpected error.
